Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Things will eventually work out when the critical moment arrives
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: 事情最後會找到解決辦法
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Derived from seafaring life in the Matsu islands
First Example Sentence: 伊這擺雖然無工做，毋免驚，船到灘頭會直。
Second Example Sentence: 咱先共這件事做好，後尾船到灘頭會直。
Third Example Sentence: 阿媽常講船到灘頭會直，叫儂著定定來。

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: If you choose a difficult path, you must endure the consequences
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: 既然做了選擇，就要承擔後果
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Linked to preserved salted fish culture in coastal villages
First Example Sentence: 儂欲賺大錢，食鹹魚著忍焦。
Second Example Sentence: 伊自家愛開店，這下辛苦嘛是食鹹魚著忍焦。
Third Example Sentence: 做兵真操，毋過食鹹魚著忍焦。

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Different people have vastly different personalities and needs
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Traditional agrarian worldview tied to rice economy
Phonetic Transcription (IPA, Matsu): /it˥ liɛʔ˨˩ mi˧ iɔŋ˨˩ paʔ˥ iɔŋ˨˩ niŋ˨˩/
First Example Sentence: 班裡學生真難教，一粒米養百樣人。
Second Example Sentence: 做生理愛知影一粒米養百樣人。
Third Example Sentence: 阿依講做人著包容，因為一粒米養百樣人。

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Someone verbally denies something while secretly caring
First Example Sentence: 伊看著若消息講無興趣，其實是嘴講無，心肝有。
Second Example Sentence: 阿兄嘴講無，心肝有，暗中攏有幫忙。
Third Example Sentence: 儂毋通信伊嘴講無，心肝有啦。

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: People adapt their speech according to the situation
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Associated with village diplomacy and local governance
Phonetic Transcription (IPA, Matsu): /tʰiŋ˥ kɔŋ˥ tsʰai˨˩ kɔŋ˨˩ tʰiŋ˥ kɔŋ˥ ue˨˩/
First Example Sentence: 伊做人真滑，天光才講天光話。
Second Example Sentence: 做生意的人著曉得天光才講天光話。
Third Example Sentence: 選舉時節，逐家攏會天光才講天光話。

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: People fear death more than poverty
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Reflects hardship mentality of fishing communities
First Example Sentence: 阿伯講驚死毋驚窮，健康上要緊。
Second Example Sentence: 做風颱天出海的人，攏知驚死毋驚窮。
Third Example Sentence: 儂毋免為著省錢傷身體，驚死毋驚窮。

Idiom (Matsu): 有嘴講別人，無嘴講家己
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: People criticize others but ignore their own faults
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: 只會批評別人，不反省自己
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Common in oral storytelling and dispute mediation
Phonetic Transcription (IPA, Matsu): /iu˨˩ tsui˨˩ kɔŋ˨˩ pieʔ˨˩ niŋ˨˩ mo˨˩ tsui˨˩ kɔŋ˨˩ ka˥ ki˧/
First Example Sentence: 伊逐工嫌別人，有嘴講別人，無嘴講家己。
Second Example Sentence: 阿叔講政治的時陣，常常有嘴講別人，無嘴講家己。
Third Example Sentence: 做人毋通有嘴講別人，無嘴講家己。

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Overly strict conditions leave no room for flexibility
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain, Neutral: 太過苛求反而沒有成果
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Widely shared Sinitic proverb localized in Matsu speech
First Example Sentence: 頭家管甲傷細，真正是水清無魚。
Second Example Sentence: 若要求逐項攏完美，最後會水清無魚。
Third Example Sentence: 先生教課真硬，學生講伊是水清無魚。

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Temporary hardship or sadness obscuring hope
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Inspired by island nightscapes and monsoon weather
First Example Sentence: 這站生理歹做，親像烏雲遮月。
Second Example Sentence: 伊失戀了後，心情若烏雲遮月。
Third Example Sentence: 阿媽講人生有時嘛會烏雲遮月。

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Even powerful forces eventually weaken or retreat
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Derived from observation of tidal life in Matsu harbors
Phonetic Transcription (IPA, Matsu): /hai˨˩ sui˨˩ iu˨˩ si˨˩ ma˨˩ oi˨˩ tʰe˥/
First Example Sentence: 伊少年真風光，這下海水有時嘛會退。
Second Example Sentence: 做官的人毋通太驕傲，海水有時嘛會退。
Third Example Sentence: 阿公講做人著謙虛，因為海水有時嘛會退。
